description.en: No restrictions on usage, dark/light mode, and a large selection of sounds.
description.zh: 无使用限制，提供深色/浅色模式以及丰富的音效选择。

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for advanced users
weaknesses.zh: 高级用户自定义选项有限

targetAudience.en: General users who need a simple and free online timer
targetAudience.zh: 需要简单免费在线计时器的一般用户

positioning.en: 123Timer positions itself as a simple and free online timer with rich features for general users.
positioning.zh: 123Timer 定位为面向一般用户的简单免费在线计时器，具有丰富的功能。
